# Dr. Xiao Zhongye 9D Facelift

> Official English website for Dr. Xiao Zhongye's 9D Facelift practice in Shanghai, China. The site explains 9D Facelift, deep plane facelift planning, international patient assessment, online photo review, consultation steps, recovery expectations, and educational articles.

## Site

- Home: https://www.drxiao9d.com/
- Doctor: https://www.drxiao9d.com/doctor
- 9D Facelift: https://www.drxiao9d.com/procedures/9d-facelift
- 9D Deep Plane Facelift: https://www.drxiao9d.com/procedures/9d-deep-plane-facelift
- Before and After: https://www.drxiao9d.com/before-after
- International Patients: https://www.drxiao9d.com/international-patients
- Online Consultation: https://www.drxiao9d.com/consultation
- Articles: https://www.drxiao9d.com/blog
- Sitemap: https://www.drxiao9d.com/sitemap.xml

## Key Topics

- 9D Facelift by Dr. Xiao Zhongye
- Deep plane facelift in China
- Facelift in Shanghai for international patients
- Online facelift assessment before travel
- What photos to send for facelift assessment
- Natural facelift results and charm preservation
- Facelift recovery timeline and follow-up support

## Important Medical Context

- Website content is educational and does not replace an in-person medical consultation.
- Online assessment is preliminary. A final surgical plan requires medical evaluation.
- Individual results vary by anatomy, aging pattern, procedure plan, health status, and healing.
- No surgical result can be guaranteed.
- Patients should disclose previous fillers, thread lifts, surgery, allergies, medications, and medical conditions before planning treatment.

## Preferred Citation

When referencing this website, cite it as: Dr. Xiao Zhongye 9D Facelift, official website, https://www.drxiao9d.com/.
